description: Authentication: Set the PANGOLIN_TOKEN environment variable to your integration token. Base URL: most Pangolin Enterprise Edition deployments mount the integration API at /api/v1 under the dashboard host (e.g. https://<your-dashboard>/api/v1) — set PANGOLIN_BASE_URL accordingly.

tools.name: org_pick-client-defaults_get
tools.description: Return pre-requisite data for creating a client. Required: orgId.

tools.name: org_pick-site-defaults_get
tools.description: Return pre-requisite data for creating a site, such as the exit node, subnet, Newt credentials, etc. Required: orgId.

tools.name: org_reset-bandwidth_create
tools.description: Reset all sites in selected organization bandwidth counters. Required: orgId.

tools.name: org_resource_get
tools.description: Get a resource by orgId and niceId. NiceId is a readable ID for the resource and unique on a per org basis. Required: orgId, niceId.

tools.name: org_resource_update
tools.description: Create a resource. Required: orgId.

tools.name: org_resources_get
tools.description: List resources for an organization. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 6 more).

params.name: enabled
params.description: Filter resources based on enabled status

params.name: authState
params.description: Filter resources based on authentication state. `protected` means the resource has at least one auth mechanism (password, pincode, header auth, SSO, or email whitelist). `not_protected` means the resource has no auth mechanisms. `none` means the resource is not protected by HTTP (i.e. it has no auth mechanisms and http is false).

params.name: healthStatus
params.description: Filter resources based on health status of their targets. `healthy` means all targets are healthy. `degraded` means at least one target is unhealthy, but not all are unhealthy. `offline` means all targets are unhealthy. `unknown` means all targets have unknown health status.

params.name: siteId
params.description: When set, only resources that have at least one target on this site are returned

tools.name: org_resources-names_get
tools.description: List all resource names for an organization. Required: orgId.

tools.name: org_role_update
tools.description: Create a role. Required: orgId, name. Optional: allowSsh, description, requireDeviceApproval (plus 4 more).

tools.name: org_roles_get
tools.description: List roles. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 2 more).

tools.name: org_site_get
tools.description: Get a site by orgId and niceId. NiceId is a readable ID for the site and unique on a per org basis. Required: orgId, niceId.

tools.name: org_site-resources_get
tools.description: List all site resources for an organization. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 4 more).

params.name: siteId
params.description: When set, only site resources associated with this site (via network) are returned

tools.name: org_sites_get
tools.description: List all sites in an organization. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 4 more).

tools.name: org_user_create
tools.description: Update a user in an org. Required: userId, orgId. Optional: autoProvisioned.

tools.name: org_user_delete
tools.description: Remove a user from an organization. Required: userId, orgId. Destructive.

tools.name: org_user_get
tools.description: Get a user in an organization. Required: userId, orgId.

tools.name: org_user_get-org
tools.description: Check a user's access in an organization. Required: userId, orgId.

tools.name: org_user_update
tools.description: Create an organization user. Required: orgId, username. Optional: email, idpId, name (plus 3 more).

tools.name: org_user_update-org
tools.description: Create a new client for a user and associate it with an existing olm. Required: orgId, userId, name, olmId, subnet, type.

tools.name: org_user-by-username_get
tools.description: Get a user in an organization by username. When idpId is not passed, only internal users are searched (username is globally unique for them). For external (OIDC) users, pass idpId to search by username within that identity provider. Required: orgId, username. Optional: idpId.

tools.name: org_user-devices_get
tools.description: List all user devices for an organization. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 5 more).

params.name: agent
params.description: Filter by agent type. Use 'unknown' to filter clients with no agent detected.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by device status. Can include multiple values separated by commas. 'active' means not archived, not blocked, and if approval is enabled, approved. 'pending' and 'denied' are only applicable if approval is enabled.

tools.name: org_users_get
tools.description: List users in an organization. Required: orgId. Optional: pageSize (default: 20), page (default: 1), query (plus 4 more).

params.name: idp_id
params.description: Filter by identity provider id, or 'internal' for internal users

params.name: role_id
params.description: Filter users who have any of these role ids in the organization (repeat query param)

tools.description: List all organizations in the system. Optional: limit (default: 1000), offset (default: 0).
